calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Off Calendar

Motion Of Plaintiff, Bank Of The West, For Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Its Request For Default Judgment Against Defendant Promedia Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Joshua R. Duffy, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Promedia, Inc.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $409,977.63
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $538.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $410,515.63

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Continued To Dec-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
